First stop, the Moon. Next stop, Mars? Why Nasa's mission matters From a race with China to lunar discoveries, the US is investing time, effort and money to head to the Moon - and beyond. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6wp6xenv0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6wp6xenv0o#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 23:50:21 GMT

75% of fans oppose VAR in Premier League, says Football Supporters' AssociationFans believe VAR is ruining goal celebrations and has not improved football since its introduction, according to a Football Supporters' Association survey. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce84xpdedpvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/ce84xpdedpvo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 23:01:15 GMT
